title: Convex Function
description: Schema representing a Convex backend function, which can be a query (read-only, reactive), mutation (transactional write), or action (general-purpose server-side operation). Functions are defined in TypeScript files within the convex/ directory of a project and deployed to a Convex backend.

path.description: The fully-qualified function identifier in the format 'module:exportName' (e.g. 'messages:list'). The module name corresponds to the file path within the convex/ directory without the .ts extension.

function_type.description: The type of Convex function, determining its execution context and capabilities.

args.description: Named arguments passed to the function as a JSON object. Key names and value types must match the function's declared validator schema.

format.description: Output format for the function response. Currently only 'json' is supported.

FunctionSuccessResponse.description: Response returned when a Convex function executes successfully.

value.description: The return value of the function. May be any valid JSON value including objects, arrays, strings, numbers, booleans, or null. The shape depends on the function's TypeScript return type.

logLines.description: Console output lines (e.g. from console.log) produced during function execution.

items.description: A single line of console output.

FunctionErrorResponse.description: Response returned when a Convex function throws an error during execution.

status.description: Indicates the function encountered an error.

errorMessage.description: A human-readable description of the error.

errorData.description: Structured error data present when the function throws a ConvexError with associated data. The shape is application-defined.

logLines.description: Console output lines produced prior to the error.

items.description: A single line of console output.

ConvexValue.description: A value that can be stored in the Convex database or passed as a function argument. Convex supports a superset of JSON including Int64 and Bytes types.

oneOf.description: Object with string keys and Convex values.

DatabaseRecord.description: A document stored in the Convex database. All documents have system-generated _id and _creationTime fields in addition to user-defined fields.

_id.description: The globally unique document identifier assigned by Convex. Encoded as a URL-safe base64 string.

_creationTime.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the document was created, assigned by the Convex server.

ScheduledFunction.description: A Convex function scheduled to run at a future time or on a recurring schedule via cron.

args.description: Arguments that will be passed to the function when it executes.

scheduled_time.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the function is scheduled to run.

state.description: Current execution state of the scheduled function.
